content: B2B buyers exhibit 'choice paralysis' when presented with more than five distinct feature sets on a single landing page.
The 'Endowment Effect' can be leveraged by offering a pre-configured, personalized workspace for new AnimaOS users during trial.
Mapped a customer journey demonstrating that the emotional pivot from 'frustration' to 'empowerment' occurs at the first successful automation trigger.
Standard martech personas are too generic; the primary psychological trigger for our users is the fear of professional obsolescence.
